products.name: OPTIMA M Series Single Pair Ethernet (SPE)
products.descriptor: Rugged ratchet-coupling SPE connector supporting up to 2.5 Gbps, IP68

evidence.snippet:
M Series Single Pair Ethernet
High-speed connectivity in a lightweight design

*   IEEE 802.3 protocol compliance and guaranteed signal integrity allow data transfer at rates up to 2.5Gb/s
*   360° screening for full EMC shielding
*   Compatibility with unshielded twisted pair (UTP) and shielded twisted pair (STP)
*   Up to 3000 guaranteed mating cycles, resulting in increased service life and reduced ownership costs

products.name: OPTIMA M Series Multi-Coax solution
products.descriptor: Multi-coaxial M Series connector supporting up to 26.5 GHz, MIL-STD tested, IP68

evidence.snippet:
LEMO expands its proven M Series with a new multi-coaxial configuration, specifically engineered to meet the demands of modern defense and communication platforms. This next-generation solution combines high-speed data performance, rugged reliability, and maximum design flexibility—all in a compact and lightweight format.
1

*   Frequency support up to 26.5 GHz
*   Low VSWR for high signal integrity
*   Smaller and lighter than MIL-DTL-38999
*   MIL-STD tested ruggedness
*   Available in 4x and 12x coaxial contact (50 Ohm)
